name: DimeVision Weld Analysis
description: AI-powered weld analysis for any MCP-compatible AI assistant. Analyze weld photos, look up defect types, get technique tips, and understand quality scoring.

tools.name: analyze_weld
tools.description: Analyze a weld photo and return quality score, defects, and recommendations. Use when someone asks to analyze, check, or rate a weld photo, or asks 'what's wrong with my weld' or 'how did my weld turn out'.

imageUrl.description: URL of the weld photo to analyze

tools.name: get_weld_defects
tools.description: Get information about weld defects, their causes, severity levels, and how to fix them. Use when someone asks about weld defects, what causes porosity, undercut, cracks, or other weld problems.

tools.name: get_bead_builder_tips
tools.description: Get MIG, TIG, and Stick welding technique tips and common mistakes. Use when someone asks for welding tips, how to improve their bead, or asks about welding technique.

tools.name: get_weld_quality_score
tools.description: Explain how DimeVision's 0-100 weld quality scoring works, what scores mean (pass/fail/professional/mastery), and the AWS/ASME standards used. Use when someone asks what a weld score means or how scoring works.
